title: Halal Rye Bread Delight
description: A rich and crunchy festive dish featuring halal-friendly rye bread which is boiled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix water and salt.
Submerge the sliced rye bread into the liquid mixture thoroughly.
Place the wet bread in an oven-safe dish or baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Drizzle the top of the soaked bread evenly with vegetable oil.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Remove from heat once done. Let it cool slightly before serving.
